title: Valve launches Steam Machine at $1,049 and defends the open ecosystem
summary: The console sparks controversy by costing more than a thousand dollars with lower performance than a low-end PC, while Valve justifies the decision to avoid creating a closed system.

title: OpenAI presents GPT-5.5-Cyber and launches a global effort to patch open-source vulnerabilities
summary: The new version surpasses Anthropic Mythos in cybersecurity, and the company launches a massive initiative to fix security bugs in open-source projects.

title: Google DeepMind invests $75 million in partnership with A24 for AI-driven film research
summary: Google's AI lab partners with independent studio A24 to develop new AI-based filmmaking tools.

title: SpaceX shares fall below IPO price for the first time
summary: The value plummets 16.4% from its all-time high, wiping out almost all retail investors' gains after the IPO.

title: Polymarket paid influencers to simulate winning bets and deceive users
summary: The decentralized betting platform created viral videos and fake websites to promote fictitious bets.

title: Oracle lays off 21,000 employees in a year due to AI adoption
summary: The company continues its restructuring with massive layoffs while investing in AI infrastructure and reducing its workforce.

title: Meta pauses employee tracking program after internal data exposure
summary: The company stopped the initiative after sensitive program information became visible internally, according to leaks.

title: Tesla investigated over fatal crash in Texas where a Model 3 hit a house
summary: The NHTSA investigates the accident that caused the death of a woman, while Tesla defends its Autopilot system and doorbell camera images are released.

title: Samsung announces UFS 5.0 with speeds of 10.8 GB/s to boost AI on mobile
summary: The new storage standard promises to multiply the performance of artificial intelligence applications on mobile devices.

title: Getty Images reaches agreement with OpenAI to include its licensed photos in ChatGPT
summary: The image bank will allow its content to appear in the chatbot's responses after a multi-year agreement.

title: Meta appoints CRED founder Kunal Shah as new head of WhatsApp
summary: The company invests $900 million in the Indian startup and puts its founder in charge of the popular messaging app.

title: Microsoft and Chevron plan a 2-gigawatt data center with its own gas plant in Texas
summary: The project seeks to avoid pressure on the state power grid by generating its own electricity from natural gas.

title: China launches GLM-5.2, an open-source AI model that worries Silicon Valley
summary: The new Chinese language system shows advanced capabilities and is available for local execution, competing with Western models.

title: Meta launches more affordable and redesigned smart glasses to attract skeptics
summary: The company's new glasses aim to democratize the use of augmented reality with a lower price and improved design.

title: Amazon Prime Day 2026 offers discounts on tech and appliances to beat the heat
summary: The deals include discounts on OLED TVs, mini-PCs, fans, and air conditioners from major brands.

title: Madison Square Garden compiled a dossier on activists opposing facial recognition
summary: The internal document included comments and tweets from critics of the New York venue's biometric security program.

title: Unpatched vulnerability discovered in Apple chips that allows iPhone jailbreak
summary: The security flaw, considered unfixable, could compromise all devices with Apple processors.

title: Microsoft now wants users to adopt Chinese AI Deepseek after Copilot’s failure
summary: The company redirects its artificial intelligence strategy towards alternative models after its Copilot assistant failed to meet expectations.

title: Judge blocks use of federal database to verify citizenship and prevent voter purges
summary: The court ruling prevents the use of a verification system that could incorrectly remove registered voters.

title: Advanced AI models collapse on classic psychological tests when cognitive load increases
summary: A study reveals that current artificial intelligence systems fail miserably when faced with tasks requiring complex reasoning.
